sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No. 185 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on office objection No.11 2. For orders on CMA No. 1236/2025 3. For orders on CMA No. 1237/2025 4. For hearing of Main Case 18.02.2026 Mr. Akhtar Ali Memon Advocate for the Applicant Learned counsel states that the questions of law framed for determination have already been decided by the learned Federal Constitutional Court against the Applicant, hence, this reference may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad PS
